disambiguation: This incident is not a benign autoscaler or CI burst because the volume of pod creation (81 events) is significantly higher than typical autoscaling behavior, which is usually more gradual. Additionally, the high novelty score of the principal suggests that this behavior is not consistent with its historical usage patterns.
key_evidence: 81 pod_create events detected in a short time frame (less than 30 minutes).
All events originated from the same principal: system:serviceaccount:kube-system:replicaset-controller.
The events occurred during business hours (not off-hours).
The principal has a high novelty score (up to 494), indicating unusual behavior for this service account.
likely_intent: Resource hijacking through excessive pod creation.
recommended_guardrails: Implement resource quotas for pod creation in the production namespace.
Monitor and alert on unusual spikes in pod creation events.
Restrict the permissions of the service account to limit its ability to create pods.
